name: zai-implement-review
description: GLM worker implements, GLM reviewers validate, GLM worker applies accepted review fixes.

chain.label: Implement task

criteria: Requested change is implemented within the approved scope
Focused validation is run or a clear reason is reported if validation is impossible
Changed files, commands run, validation output, and residual risks are reported
stopRules: Do not expand product scope beyond the user task
Stop and report if a fix requires an unapproved architecture, product, or security decision

chain.task: Implement this task as the only writer against the active worktree unless worktree isolation was explicitly requested. Task: {task}

parallel.label: Correctness review
Tests and validation review
Maintainability review

chain.label: Apply accepted review fixes

criteria: Only review fixes worth doing now are applied
Focused validation is rerun or a clear reason is reported if validation is impossible
Final changed files, commands, validation output, and residual risks are reported
stopRules: Do not apply optional polish or scope expansion
Stop and report if reviewer feedback requires an unapproved decision
